Version
  • API Reference
  • I/O
  • I/O


I/O

KWave.jl uses HDF5 files compatible with the k-Wave C++ binary solver format. Pass save_to_disk="/path/to/input.h5" to kspace_first_order to write an input file instead of running the simulation in Julia. The C++ binary can then be run separately and the output read back with read_output.

Writing

KWave.write_matrix — Function
write_matrix(filename, dataset_name, data; compression=true)

Write an array to an HDF5 file as a named dataset.

Julia arrays are already column-major (Fortran order), matching k-Wave's C++ binary expectations, so no transposition is needed.

Arguments

  • filename: Path to HDF5 file
  • dataset_name: Name of the dataset within the file
  • data: Array to write
  • compression: Whether to use gzip compression (default: true)
source
KWave.write_grid — Function
write_grid(filename, kgrid; pml_size, pml_alpha)

Write grid dimensions, spacing, time parameters, and PML configuration to an HDF5 file in the k-Wave C++ binary format.

Arguments

  • filename: Path to HDF5 file
  • kgrid: AbstractKWaveGrid
  • pml_size: PML size (Int or Tuple)
  • pml_alpha: PML absorption coefficient (Float64 or Tuple)
source
KWave.write_flags — Function
write_flags(filename, flags)

Write simulation configuration flags to an HDF5 file.

Arguments

  • filename: Path to HDF5 file
  • flags: Dict{String, Any} of flag names and values
source
KWave.write_attributes — Function
write_attributes(filename)

Write file-level metadata attributes to an HDF5 file.

Writes:

  • created_by: "KWave.jl"
  • creation_date: Current date/time string
  • file_type: "input"
  • major_version: "1"
  • minor_version: "2"
source

Reading

KWave.read_matrix — Function
read_matrix(filename, dataset_name)

Read an array from an HDF5 file.

Arguments

  • filename: Path to HDF5 file
  • dataset_name: Name of the dataset within the file

Returns

Array read from the file.

source
KWave.read_output — Function
read_output(filename)

Read a k-Wave simulation output HDF5 file and return a SimulationOutput.

Arguments

  • filename: Path to HDF5 output file

Returns

SimulationOutput containing all recorded fields.

source

File Format

The HDF5 file layout mirrors the k-Wave C++ binary specification:

DatasetWritten byContent
ux_source_input, p_source_input, …write_matrixSource time series arrays
Nx, Ny, Nz, dx, dy, dz, dt, Ntwrite_gridGrid parameters
p_source_flag, u_source_flag, …write_flagsSimulation flags
created_by, file_description, …write_attributesMetadata strings
« UtilitiesReference Solutions »
